Description.Name: Unknown
Description.Details: The [[DM.Factions[faction_331stDivision],<Unknown>]] was your home, showing you that dirty tricks are just another way to win.

OptionDescription:
MechWarriors who hail from the [[DM.Factions[faction_331stDivision],<Unknown>]] tend to the secretive side of things.   When provoked they act with lighting quickness generating explosive results. 

Founded as a hybridization between Monarchy and a constitutional Republic, The *ERROR* Unreadable *ERROR* is a secretive and un-assuming player in the [[DM.BaseDescriptionDefs[LoreRimwardPeriphery],Rimward Periphery]].
BioDescription: You grew up in the *ERROR* Unreadable *ERROR*, You and your kin fought for survival every day. You learned to hit your targets faster and more accurately to avoid return fire.
